resources.string: Theme, palette, and general display style
Font size, line spacing, and content width
Manage folders, sorting, and favorite actions
Notification, battery, and background sync setup
Cache storage and launch cleanup settings
Daily sign mode and repair preference
Are you sure you want to remove this favorite?
The system currently does not prioritize background sync for this app due to battery optimization.
Failed to obtain login information, please log in again
After completing the Cloudflare verification, the program will fill in all the time after successful sign-in until it can no longer be filled in.
Yamibo is under maintenance... Now is not a good time to sign in.
The background synchronization task has been interrupted and can be resynchronized.
Please enter the category name first
Do you want to sync this favorite to Yamibo?
The smart update policy has not been accessed yet, and the periodic background check is suspended.
Cancellation will remove the current favorite item.
Currently not logged in, site search is not available
If the device manufacturer imposes additional restrictions on background execution, you can enter the system App settings from here and adjust it.
I am TheNano, the author of YamiboApp, which is an open source App independently developed by a third party.
Enter keywords or URLs to search for posts
Please allow notification permission first before background synchronization will be displayed in the notification bar.
Jumping to the announcement page is not supported yet.
TODO: The reply positioning jump has not been accessed yet
Notifications for this app are currently turned off. Please turn it back on, otherwise synchronization will still not be displayed in the notification bar.
Failed to load; you can enter manually
After turning it on, when the favorite disappears completely, you will be asked whether to synchronize it with the Yamibo.
Sign-in information has not been obtained yet
Use a reading background behind the status bar and bottom navigation bar to prevent transparent system bars from covering the content.
This page mainly explains the restrictions on iOS and does not provide Android-style system authorization shortcuts.
💡 tips: The tab page is similar to a regular comic app, recommended for collecting comics
At least one item in the currently selected favorite exists in multiple favorite paths.
Ask for synchronization when adding a favorite
The notification bar can display the background synchronization progress and completion results normally.

Android's background sync relies on foreground notifications. After synchronization is started, as long as the notification appears successfully, the app will continue to execute when it is reduced in size.
The status and progress of the latest favorite synchronization will be displayed here. Once the sync has started, you can also reopen the progress screen from here.
There is no favorite update task to continue
Join only part of the collection
Do you want to delete favorites under all paths?
This collection has no content yet
The vote was successful, refreshing the page...
The update page does not require network loading
The current directory favorite has been removed
Click to jump to the comment area
Conversion between Simplified and Traditional Chinese
Add, edit, delete or adjust your favorite categories
After turning it on, the confirmation window will no longer pop up when deleting favorites.
TODO: Message interaction has not been connected yet
Start global refresh of favorite updates
Update check was interrupted by the system
Yamibo favorite has been synchronized to the local
Added to local favorite, but sync target not found.
Please keep the app in the foreground before starting sync.
Check system settings required for notification permissions, battery optimization, and background sync.
Tip: Long press to edit the favorite path in detail
Rating successful, update rating/review status after refreshing
Background synchronization must display progress in the notification bar. This can be granted directly within the app.
Already added to local favorite, default saved to uncategorized
iOS can only maintain execution for a short period of time after entering the background. If the system hangs the app, collection synchronization may still be interrupted.
Please log in first before searching
Are you sure you want to synchronize Yamibo favorites to your local computer?
If you wait too long, you can reload it.
Press again to exit the app
Check the major categories, or click in to select small collections

Some brands impose additional restrictions on background synchronization. If you have turned on notifications and battery optimization, but tasks are still frequently suspended, please check the instructions for the corresponding model.
The system currently does not allow background synchronization to be initiated. Please try again with the app in the foreground.
Not logged in, please log in first before adding it to favorites
In manual mode, only this preference is saved; in semi-automatic mode, the signature will be replenished automatically.
Already added to favorites, default saved to uncategorized
Will the favorite of Lily be removed simultaneously?
There is no reading history yet
The main access required for background synchronization is now in place.
The synchronization task cannot be found.
iOS currently does not have the persistent foreground notifications and long-term background synchronization capabilities that Android does.
The review is successful, and the rating/review status will be updated after refreshing.
Do you want to remove this favorite from the Yamibo website?
Some devices will terminate the background network early due to battery optimization. It is recommended to add this app to the ignore optimization list.
The star button can be directly collected, and a long press can be used to specify a small favorite.
Background sync cannot be started at this time, please try again with the app in the foreground.
Closing this screen will not abort synchronization, and you can still check the progress again later from the Favorites page or Settings page.
Please log in first before sending message
All favorites will be rechecked and new update tasks created. A large number of error records may be generated during website maintenance.
The specified floor cannot be found. Jumped to the nearest floor.
After turning it on, when creating a new favorite, you will be asked whether to synchronize it to Yamibo.
This link does not support opening within the app.
Please open the check-in page WebView first to let the program capture the page content, or use the button below to refresh manually.
Display favorite update check progress and results
Please log in first before commenting
Ask for simultaneous deletion when completely removing favorites
Will it be synchronized to Lily Favorite?
Automatic check-in is currently unavailable, please use manual mode instead
Added to favorites, but sync failed: %1$s
Added locally, but Yamibo sync failed: %1$s
%1$d direct favorites and %2$d favorites inside collections.
This item is currently saved in: %1$s
Page %1$d failed to load. Tap to retry
%1$d required permissions are missing. Background sync notifications will work after they are fixed.
Required permissions are ready, but %1$d recommended settings can reduce background sync interruptions.
Clear images, pages, and other temporary data to free storage.\nCurrent cache size: %1$s
No login data found. Please sign in again.
Login expired. Please sign in again.
Name "%1$s" is already used by a category
Name "%1$s" is already used by a collection
This favorite type cannot be synced to Yamibo yet.
This favorite is already synced to Yamibo.
Not signed in to Yamibo, so favorites cannot be synced.
Yamibo is under maintenance. Try again later.
Synced to Yamibo, but the favorite order could not be backfilled yet. It will be repaired on the next sync.
Synced to Yamibo, but the favorite order could not be backfilled: %1$s
The sync target category no longer exists. Choose it again.
The website favorite page count changed during sync. Running sync again is recommended.
Favorite item is missing a thread ID: %1$s
Duplicate thread found in the website favorites: %1$s
Not signed in to Yamibo. Sign in again and retry sync.
Yamibo is under maintenance. Try again later.
%1$d favorites were already synced to %2$s and will not be synced again
Not signed in to Yamibo, so website favorites cannot be deleted.
Yamibo is under maintenance. Try again later.
This favorite has no website favorite id, so website deletion is not available yet.
Login state was refreshed, but formHash is still unavailable.
Loaded %1$d tracked items, resuming from item %2$d
Yamibo is under maintenance, cannot check %1$s
There may be multiple new items
Tag page count changed too much; there may be multiple new threads
Finding parent author post for comment
Precise location failed; opened the novel page
Verification passed, but the sign button was not found. Use manual mode.
Cloudflare verification for the sign page is not complete. Finish it in WebView first.
Check versions, download APKs, and open installation
Update info comes from a manifest. Mainland users can prefer Gitee/GitCode mirrors.
You are on the latest version: %1$s
Download complete. System installation has been opened.
Allow this app to install unknown apps, then tap download again.
Checks for updates in the background after launch; no network request is made before the interval passes.
A new version is available. Download it now, or handle it later from Settings > App updates.
If you have not checked in today, remind you after the app opens.
You have not checked in today
Daily check-in is not completed today.
